name: kzybala-pl
description: Static site build/quality tooling. No runtime dependencies — see docs/new-lab-workflow.md.

scripts.test: npm run test:reducers && npm run test:keyboard && npm run test:registry && npm run test:curriculum && npm run test:benchmark-platform && npm run test:benchmark-results && npm run test:linux-evidence && npm run test:snapshots
scripts.verify: npm run validate:labs && npm run validate:curriculum && npm run build:labs-index && npm run build:sitemap && npm run build:legacy-results && npm run validate:benchmark-results && npm run check:sizes && npm run validate:html && npm run check:a11y && npm run check:no-js-fallback && npm run check:consistency && npm run check:public-content && npm run test
